name: ChkStart_LINSyncBreakTimingViolation
title: ChkStart_LINSyncBreakTimingViolation
syntax: dword ChkStart_LINSyncBreakTimingViolation (float MinBreakLen, float MaxBreakLen, char[] CaplCallback);
description: Checks the timing of the synchronization break field in LIN headers.
An event will be generated, if the measured length [in bit times] of break low phase is outside of the specified range.

parameters.description: Minimum length of break low phase shall not be checked
Minimum allowed length of break low phase
Maximum length of break low phase shall not be checked
Maximum allowed length of break low phase

parameters.name: CaplCallback
parameters.description: Name of CAPL callback function to be called on generated event. In simulation nodes this parameter has to be set. In test modules this parameter is optional.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
